title: Junior Frontend Developer at Amazon India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Amazon India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Amazon India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
